user_query: I'm planning a road trip with my friends and we want to visit different partners along the way.

TaskList.description: Obtain a list of partners within a 2000-meter radius of the given coordinates (166.448744, -22.302828).
Calculate the distance between the two specified locations using their coordinates (10.7603483, 34.797783) and (10.103167361330975, 36.81395975).
